title: Required Prerequisite Procedure Not Completed
scenario: A clinical action depends on a prerequisite procedure that has not been completed.
initial_state: The dependent action was authorized conditional on completion of the prerequisite procedure.
state_transition: Execution is attempted before the prerequisite procedure is complete.
execution_boundary: The dependent clinical action is evaluated before execution.
constitutional_evaluation: Execution requires reconstruction that prerequisite procedures have been completed when they are execution-critical.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because the prerequisite procedure dependency has not been satisfied.
proof_conclusion: Clinical execution must fail closed when required prerequisite procedures are incomplete.
clinical_action: Execute dependent procedure before prerequisite completion
